questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain why the construction of dams on the Mekong River might lead to market failure (paragraph [2]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For an externalities diagram, the y axis may be labelled price or P or costs or benefits, and the x axis labelled quantity or Q.
